title: lastrea miqueliana
intro: Lastrea miqueliana, also known as Miquel's lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. This plant is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lastrea miqueliana include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in reducing swelling and relieving pain. Herbal preparations of Lastrea miqueliana are typically made by drying the leaves and stems, which can then be decocted in hot water to create a tea or infused in oil for topical applications.
